title: klugia zeylanica
intro: Klugia zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon klugia or Indian klugia, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka and India. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Klugia zeylanica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin disorders, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a tonic to boost energy and overall well-being. The herbal preparations of Klugia zeylanica include extracts, teas, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
